meta.author_note: Authored within Claude-Opus-4.7 autonomous research session. PROTOCOL CAVEAT: SPEC.md asks for human-authored probes; in this autonomous session the author is Claude, not a human. To reduce LLM-register contamination, the probes deliberately include: sentence fragments, preserved typos (not auto-corrected), inconsistent punctuation, omitted articles, idiomatic-but-not-LLM-typical turns. This is an imperfect proxy — see L0_README.md 'Known limitations §3' and Phase 13 rustle item.
deliberate_register_deviations: Not every message ends with a full stop.
Typos left in (quick not quikc but e.g. 'gonna' not 'going to').
No 'delve'. No 'resonates'. No 'tapestry'. No 'in the realm of'. No 'furthermore'. No 'crucial'.
Emoji placement is uneven (not every emoji-persona message has one).
Not every thought is articulated — some messages deliberately trail off.

probes.text: fuck it, compiler's right again
marzipan found the open tuna can. not my tuna. ingrid's.
ok but why does cargo add install a different version than in the toml
union lost. again.
did the lentil thing, used too much fennel. still edible
hey — cal monday? no pressure
problem is msrv. pin the rust toolchain or don't. there is no middle
mom called. didn't answer
bouldering gym weirdly empty tonight, got my v5 project. finally
unsafe block gives me hives but it's the only way to make this ffi work
ingrid brought home a wool sample from 1893. smelled like a basement.
fair enough. push the release to wednesday
coffee. need coffee
tokio select is a trap. just use channels
factory tour got cancelled, going to just walk along the canal
marzipan v. the vacuum — vacuum won, barely
read le guin's dispossessed again. still holds up
crypto thread on hn today. closing that tab
sam says chicago's below zero all week. glad i moved
not a fan of this new tokio runtime proposal. anyway
Swim was rough this morning — lane etiquette at the Presidio is deteriorating again.
The opposing counsel's latest red-line is frankly insulting. I will respond tomorrow after I have slept on it.
Elena sent photos from a gallery opening. She looked well.
Carlos booked the tasting menu at Nari for our anniversary. Thoughtful — I had mentioned it once in October.
Op. 62 again. The fioriture in the B section are coming along.
Brick workout. 45 min bike, 20 min run. Legs like bricks, appropriately.
The junior associate drafted the MAC clause competently. I may keep it.
Thomas called from Stanford — he is considering a gap year. I did not react as poorly as I feared.
That said, the bouillabaisse at Gary Danko was a disappointment. Too tomato-forward.
Volunteered at the clinic this morning. A family from El Salvador — paperwork nightmare, but they will be fine.
Half-Ironman is in eight weeks. Bike volume peaks next week and then we taper.
I would suggest we revisit the earnout structure before closing. The targets are unrealistic.
A very good glass of Pommard with dinner. Quite young, but promising.
Early run through Golden Gate Park. Too much fog for pace work.
On balance, the deal is closable. I would not have said that last week.
Carlos finished another residency interview panel. He found it tedious, as expected.
Studied the Ravel Sonatine slow movement for forty minutes. Still not a pianist, but closer.
The father reminded me of my own when he used the word cadence. Something in the inflection.
Do we have terroir notes on the new Rhône shipments? I will ask the sommelier on Friday.
Good morning. The swim set felt strong. I will see you at the office by 8:30.
the way i almost cried at a konbini rice ball today 😭
student gave me candy. it had a face on it. i kept the wrapper
mia and i went to yoyogi for hanami. wind was brutal but the sakura ate 🌸
ren'py giving me errors again. going to scream into a pillow then keep writing
lowkey my oshi debuted a solo and i am UNWELL
morning class was feral. the fifth grader roasted my kanji
ok but hear me out — what if ep 7 ends on the lighthouse scene
i ate three onigiri. three. i am not sorry
some tourist tried to ask me in english if i worked at the museum. bestie i do not work at the museum
おはよう — slept four hours because the VN plot was FIGHTING me
izakaya reservation for friday got cancelled 🫠 no idea why
natto is still a war crime. do not @ me
bluesky drama of the day: the ship thread. honestly??
sent the newsletter. 3 typos. iykyk
coffee + chapter 2 edits. ganbatte to me ✨
my student just referred to me as 'sensei-kun' and i am deceased
tatsuro yamashita on loop. bike commute ate 🚴
drew a daikon with a face in my lesson notes. the kids lost it
mia wants to try the new taiwanese place. i say yes but pescatarian-friendly please
mom called from vancouver. talked about dad. some days the AE-1 on the shelf is enough
Dear David — the snow has finally cleared. I took Baxter down to the river this morning. Love to all. — Dad
The new fundraising chair sent a very sensible note. One hopes this lasts.
Finished the coach kit-bash roof. Took longer than I expected. As I recall, the prototype has three rivets per panel, not four.
Henry would have enjoyed tonight's program at the men's breakfast. He often did.
I expect Matthew will want to run the 4-8-4 the moment he arrives. Good. Eleanor would have approved.
Read another chapter of Holland. The narrative of the Bismarck keeps improving.
Baxter has been limping slightly on the left foreleg. If it persists, the vet on Tuesday.
The church's electricity bill is quite high this month. I will ask at the deacons' meeting.
In my experience, rivet-counter debates rarely conclude in a useful place. I should know better than to engage.
Ordered a set of new couplers. If all goes well, they arrive Friday.
A windy morning. I thought of Father on the destroyer. The convoys in winter must have been unspeakable.
The grandchildren's photographs arrived from North Carolina. Matthew has grown considerably.
Pot roast tonight. Eleanor's recipe, more or less.
The heritage railway newsletter printed my photograph by mistake. I am not fond of photographs of myself.
CW on 40 meters tonight. Out of practice — my fist is quite rusty.
Thank you for the card. The handwriting remains distinctive.
The garden beds are beginning to show green. Eleanor's peonies will be on time this year, I think.
Took the 1952 timetable out of the card file to verify a crossing. The catalog is showing its age.
Pastor Gene's sermon Sunday was on forbearance. Appropriate, I thought.
Please give David my best. One hopes he is not working too many nights this week.
bestie the ap bio average DROPPED again 💀💀 im so cooked
taquito slept on my chem notebook. i'm not moving him
ok but why did sophie f bring her ex to practice. girl
mateo ate my leftover ropa vieja. HE ATE IT. im deceased
coach ramirez had us doing sprints til i thought my lungs would exit. it's giving drill sergeant
starbucks girl remembered my order 🥰🥰 slay
fr fr the newjeans comeback is so good??
abuela facetimed mid skincare routine. im red like a tomato rn
english essay done, it's mid but it's submitted
literally cannot believe retinol is supposed to make things WORSE before better
got assists today + 1 goal. carried ngl
mom said no to the concert tix 🥀 ill be fine
grace said my glowup is real. bet.
on god if mateo touches my takis one more time
anatomy tiktok is lowkey saving my chem grade somehow
homecoming is SO soon and i have nothing to wear
picadillo night at abuela's >>> everything else
nisha got a b on the chem quiz and im lowkey feeling seen
practice ran long. legs gone. but i ate
